arts.ttl: Aston Villa pull back with offer – Quickly moving to other targets
arts.sum: On Tuesday, the media local to Villarreal first reported Juan Foyth was out of training because he awaiting news on a move to Aston Villa, and then reported it was related to an injury. arts.ttl: What John McGinn said about drawing his boyhood club Celtic in the Champions League
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has the chance to claim a seeded playoff place with a positive result at Villa Park but the Bhoys could also secure a Champions League top-eight finish if results in other games go Rodgers’ way. The draw created excitement with Celtic to face English opposition once again in Europe, but what did McGinn and his Villa teammates think of drawing his boyhood club in the Champions League when both teams were pulled out together?

arts.ttl: ‘Nothing should stand in way’ of Aston Villa player’s exit – Announcement on the way as medical passed
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are edging closer towards completing a move for Aston Villa’s Emiliano Buendía in the winter market, according to Sky Deutschland. The Bundesliga winners made firm progress in their efforts to sign the 28-year-old and have reached an agreement with Aston Villa. arts.ttl: Aston Villa ACCEPT Duran offer as €100m U-turn made
arts.sum: It is Cristiano Ronaldo’s Al-Nassr that are going to win the race for the 21-year-old striker, with L’Equipe reporting that Aston Villa are about to accept a €70 million bid that will make Duran the second biggest sale in club history behind only Jack Grealish, who left for €117.5m to Manchester City in 2021. Aston Villa are on the verge of accepting a bid for striker Jhon Duran, with the Birmingham club set to hit a transfer jackpot with the departure of the Colombia international striker.
